waterings.insight: Self-knowledge is prerequisite to all other knowledge. You cannot accurately perceive the world through a lens you haven't examined. Every bias, every projection, every assumption — they all live in the gap between who you think you are and who you actually are.

[pollination with seed-20260407-dc297ca6] Knowing thyself IS recognizing that your self-model is a map, not territory. The image you hold of yourself is an abstraction — useful but lossy. True self-knowledge requires continuously checking the map against lived reality.

[pollination with seed-20260407-8d426d98] Know thyself is the prerequisite to 'as yourself.' You cannot love your neighbor as yourself if you do not know who that self is. Self-knowledge enables authentic love; without it, love is projection.
